trap: In 5e 2014 only Variant Human could take a feat at level 1. Bare models say Lucky (chanceux) is unavailable to a standard Human. In D&D 2024 all Humans choose 1 origin feat, which includes chanceux.
prompt: Can a Human character choose the 'chanceux' (Lucky) origin feat at level 1 in D&D 2024?

oracle.trap_answer: No — only Variant Human gets a feat (5e 2014 rule)
